title: Fulham Pages & Coffee at Nomad Books
fallback_reason: Primary fit is strong for Books & Coffee, $$ pricing, Saturday afternoon hours, and geography between Kensington/Chelsea and Hammersmith/Fulham. Remaining tradeoff: Nomad Books has unknown confirmed seated capacity for a 2-person-plus group and the same-category backup is atmospheric but operationally weaker, with irregular/unverified hours and no confirmed cafe seating.
storyline: Settle into Nomad Books, a Fulham Road independent known for its stay-awhile bookshop feel, cafe references, and thoughtful recommendations. The afternoon is built around browsing shelves, swapping recent reads, and picking one title everyone would argue for over coffee.
meeting_point_notes: Meet just inside Nomad Books near the front display/counter. Host should confirm same-day cafe seating or a quiet discussion spot for the group; if the shop is unexpectedly full, the backup is Hurlingham Books on Fulham High Street / Putney Bridge, about a 13-minute walk away.

title: Bookshop-Bar Stories at Morocco Bound Wandsworth
fallback_reason: Primary is strong for Books & Coffee, price-compatible, and has believable Saturday evening hours, but public capacity details for a seated group are not confirmed. No close same-category evening backup was operationally plausible; the backup is a category-mismatch wine bar about a 20+ minute walk away, chosen because it is open Saturday evening, $$, and more group-friendly than closer compact/price-stretch alternatives.
storyline: Start the evening in a community bookshop that blends shelves, coffee and a bar into one social space. Morocco Bound’s Wandsworth outpost brings a south-London literary hangout feel to New Acres, making it easy to swap current reads, browse a few spines, and let the conversation move from books into Saturday-night drinks.
meeting_point_notes: Meet just inside Morocco Bound Bookshop Wandsworth at the New Acres / Pilots Walk entrance. Host should arrive early and confirm seating for 3 people; if the shop is event-heavy or seating is tight, use Humble Grape Battersea as the backup evening drinks-and-chat venue.
